outputs.description: Unique task ID of the scanned file. CloudConvert.Task.status Status of the current task.
outputs.name: CloudConvert.Task.id

outputs.description: Response message from the API. CloudConvert.Task.operation The operation that was performed.
outputs.name: CloudConvert.Task.message

outputs.description: The file name of the downloaded file. CloudConvert.Task.result.files.size The size of the downloaded file.
outputs.name: CloudConvert.Task.result.files.filename

outputs.description: The URL of the downloaded file. CloudConvert.Task.created_at Date
outputs.name: CloudConvert.Task.result.files.url

outputs.description: CloudConvert.Task.started_at Date Start time of the task.
outputs.name: Time the task was created.

outputs.description: Date End time of the task. CloudConvert.Task.host_name
outputs.name: CloudConvert.Task.ended_at

outputs.description: Name of the host used for the task. CloudConvert.Task.storage Storage server used for the task.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The ID of the previous task conducted on this file. CloudConvert.Task.links API link for the task.
outputs.name: CloudConvert.Task.depends_on_task_ids
